x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: HR case categories are the primary classification signal for Now Assist HRSD AI routing and similar case matching. Inconsistent or missing categorization limits AI routing accuracy and case deflection effectiveness.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Enforce HR Service as mandatory at case creation via UI policy. Standardize HR Service values to align with Now Assist routing rules. Target: 85%+ of closed HR cases with HR Service populated in the trailing 12 months.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_72f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c53
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[HR case categories are the primary classification signal for Now Assist HRSD AI routing and similar case matching. Inconsistent or missing categorization limits AI routing accuracy and case deflection effectiveness.]]></ai_justification><check_name>HR Case Categorization</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // HR case closed states: 3=Closed Complete, 4=Closed Incomplete
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sn_hr_core_case');
    gaTotal.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,4');
    gaTotal.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No closed HR cases in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No closed HR cases found in the last 12 months. HR Service categorization cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaCat = new GlideAggregate('sn_hr_core_case');
    gaCat.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,4');
    gaCat.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaCat.addQuery('hr_service', '!=', '');
    gaCat.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaCat.query();
    var categorized = gaCat.next() ? parseInt(gaCat.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((categorized / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of closed HR cases have HR Service populated (last 12 months, ' + categorized + '/' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 85) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of closed HR cases have HR Service populated. Now Assist HRSD has strong classification signal for AI-driven routing and similar case matching.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 60) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of closed HR cases have HR Service populated (target: 85%). Now Assist HRSD AI routing and similar case matching will have reduced accuracy.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of HR cases have HR Service populated. Insufficient classification signal — Now Assist HRSD AI routing requires consistent HR Service categorization.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>HRSD</module><number>CHK0000397</number><order>50</order><remediation_guidance>Enforce HR Service as mandatory at case creation via UI policy. Standardize HR Service values to align with Now Assist routing rules. Target: 85%+ of closed HR cases with HR Service populated in the trailing 12 months.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>72f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c53</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>HR Case Categorization</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_72f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c53</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
